name: Pyrite
description: Also known as Fool's Gold, Pyrite is a common component in the manufacture of photovoltaic panels. It is also used in magnetic data storage technologies and non-rechargeable batteries.

name: Quantumium
description: The raw ore used to make Quantum Keystones. Since it has not been processed, it occupies more space than a Quantum Keystone does.

name: Deuterium
description: Deuterium is normally harvested from the cloudy atmostpheres of gas giants. However, it can also be found frozen in the icy cores of wandering comets.

name: Fossil
description: An alien fossil found in the void of space. Unless you can find the right buyer, most will only see a cheap trinket that can be sold as a souvenir to gullible tourists. 	This is a rare relic. You can install it on your ship to keep it from getting mixed in with the regular cargo.

name: Mysterious Treasure
description: The old stories of pirates burying treasure in some out of the way dirt clod are true! While you can sell it anywhere for a modest sum, having it appraised by someone with knowledge of rare artifacts may yield better results. 	This may be a rare artifact. You can install it on your ship to keep it from getting mixed in with the regular cargo.

name: Earth Artifact
description: This is an artifact from Earth's distant past with some historical significance. You can sell it for a decent sum. 	This is a rare artifact. You can install it on your ship to keep it from getting mixed in with the regular cargo.

name: Alien Artifact
description: This is an artifact from an unknown alien civilization that once occupied what is now human space. You can sell it for a significant sum! 	This is a rare artifact. You can install it on your ship to keep it from getting mixed in with the regular cargo.

name: Space Junk
description: Centuries after they've ceased functioning, the wreckage of old satellites and probes can still be found littering space. The reward for recycling this junk isn't much, but if you won't do your part to keep the galaxy clean, who will?

name: Dysprosium
description: Dysprosium is never naturally found as a free element. Many industries in a spacefaring civilization have a use for it.

name: Krypton
description: Krypton is used in nuclear fusion energy research and experimental particle physics.

name: Radon
description: Radon is used in some radiation cancer therapies. Ironically, due to its radioactive properties, it is also a carcinogen.

name: Xenon
description: Xenon is the preferred propellant used by Ion Engines since it is more environmentally friendly and less corrosive than other alternatives.

name: Hackerz Plugin Omega
description: Installing this onto a ship should allow you to install one outfit that normally could not be installed due to reinstall. 	This cannot be uninstalled while the other outfit is installed, so use this with caution.

name: Hackerz Plugin Alpha
description: Installing this onto a ship should allow you to uninstall one outfit that normally could not be uninstalled due to integrated systems or fused circuits. 	This cannot be uninstalled unless the other outfit is installed, so use this with caution.

name: Hackerz Plugin Sigma
description: Installing this onto a ship disables its spinal mount. Why anyone would do this is unknown. 	This cannot be installed onto a ship that doesn't have a spinal mount or if something is already installed in its spinal mount.

name: Popcorn Box
description: A box filled with golden buttery popcorn to enjoy while watching a story unfold. 	Certain rare missions are more likely to trigger while this is installed on your flagship.

name: Rusty Asteroid Scanner
description: The circuits of this rusty old asteroid scanner are fused into your ship, but it still works. Unfortunately the effective range is so low you might not realize an asteroid is minable until you're practically on top of it.

name: Gremlin Circuits
description: Some fused circuits from when you salvaged parts to make the Gremlin. You never got around to fixing it, but they're not connected to anything important so it should be fine...

name: Food?
description: This is barely edible, but it should be able to keep you going for another day.

name: Speck Access Temporary License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Speck Rounds. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Speck Rounds even if it is normally not stocked there. 	The Aberrant threat has loosened any restrictions the Twilight Guard would normally have on sharing this technology. 	This tech can be researched instead of purchased. (Hover/Tap the attributes below for more details.) 	After this is acquired it can be found in the Licenses area in future visits to the outfitter.

name: Speck Tech License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Speck Rounds. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Speck Rounds even if it is normally not stocked there. 	The Aberrant threat has loosened any restrictions the Twilight Guard would normally have on sharing this technology.

name: Nettle Access Temporary License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Nettle KKVs. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Nettle KKVs even if it is normally not stocked there. 	The Aberrant threat has loosened any restrictions the Twilight Guard would normally have on sharing this technology. 	This tech can be researched instead of purchased. (Hover/Tap the attributes below for more details.) 	After this is acquired it can be found in the Licenses area in future visits to the outfitter.

name: Nettle Tech License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Nettle KKVs. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Nettle KKVs even if it is normally not stocked there. 	The Aberrant threat has loosened any restrictions the Twilight Guard would normally have on sharing this technology.

name: Voidjelly
description: Voidjellies are poisonous and have almost no commercial value. They are, however, a favorite food of certain large Voidfish that are immune to the toxin. A high enough concentration of them within a water droplet is likely to attract a Voidlunker.

name: Voidlunker
description: Occasionally, a voidborne fish grows to a particularly large size. These lunkers are highly prized among a small community of fishing enthusiasts. Such specimens are preserved through a process, similar to taxidermy, for display in private collections. 	This is a rare catch. You can install it on your ship to keep it from getting mixed in with the regular cargo.

name: Murkfish
description: Most of the voidborne fish found in the dark waters of Murk appear even more alien than those caught in Gossamer. This exotic appearance is enhanced by a larger representation of species exhibiting some form of bioluminescence.

name: Rotting Murk Flesh
description: A chunk of rotting flesh found scattered through out the waters of Murk. The size and shape suggest these came from something larger than a capital ship... 	The flesh itself is too far gone to have any market value, but it is teeming with crustaceans, mollusks, and other small invertebrates feeding upon it. These scavengers seem like they might be edible if cooked properly.

name: Wither Wood
description: Underneath the tree's rotting exterior, Wither Wood shines with an unearthly glow. The bio-matter has been imbued with high levels of radioactive uranium. Whether natural evolution or artificial bio-engineering caused this is a mystery. Some may find this substance useful as an alternative energy source or weapons development material. But it probably wouldn't be a good idea to sell these at a concerts as glow sticks.

name: Orange Optical Laser
description: The three lasers mounted on this heavy turret are effective at smelting asteroids and harvesting other interstellar resources. They also generate more heat than most other Avgi lasers, both on the ship they are installed on as well as any ship they strike. An optical lasing generator is integrated into the weapon, contributing to its considerable size and weight.

name: Prismatic Optical Laser
description: This heavy turret was designed during a time when the Avgi were still uncertain which wavelengths are ideal for defending against missiles. An integrated optical lasing generator cycles through the spectrum, creating a dazzling effect that greatly disrupts optical tracking systems.

name: Red Optical Laser
description: This specialized gun was designed for smelting asteroids and harvesting other interstellar resources. An optical lasing generator is integrated into the weapon, making it simpler to install but less compatible with modern Avgi laser weapons.

name: Speck Magazine Depot
description: The Speck Magazine Depot stages extra ammunition in your cargo bay for weapons that use Speck Rounds. The ammunition is ready to be withdrawn for use. Storing it this way uses more cargo space than if it were packed away in sealed crates. An extra crewmember is required to maintain inventory.

name: Deflector Lamina
description: These shield emitters can be mounted conformally to a ship's hull, adding to the shield coverage of the hull surface by half. This causes the shield generators to work harder than they normally would, doubling all resource requirements to restore lost shields. 	Deflector Laminae take advantage of special external hardpoints built into most Avgi ships, allowing them to be mounted without taking up any outfit space. However, they also tend to increase the amount of heat absorbed from the local star.

name: Harvester Scanner
description: This compact scanner is configured to assist short range data collection for Void Harvesters instead of providing long range tactical data.

name: Harvester Spectrometer
description: This compact set of spectrometers is specialized for analyzing the spectral signatures of natural raw materials in order to determine their composition. It lacks the functionality to identify manufactured goods and equipment.

name: Avgi Harvester License
description: While wearing this pendant, the Avgi will recognize you as a competent Void Harvester and offer you access to their more specialized harvesting tools and ships. 	The tiny Voidfish dangling from the chain looks remarkably life-like. Shaking it back and forth makes it appear as if it's trying to slip off a fishing hook.

name: Bunrodean Artifact License
description: The outfitter occasionally shows off rare artifacts that aren't actually for sale.

name: Swarm Access Temporary License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Swarm Missiles. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Swarm Missiles even if it is normally not stocked there. 	Amazingly, this is written in your language! The outfitter is presenting it as a curiosity left behind by a previous human visitor to their space. Unfortunately, it is not for sale. 	This tech can be researched instead of purchased. (Hover/Tap the attributes below for more details.) 	After this is acquired it can be found in the Licenses area in future visits to the outfitter.

name: Swarm Tech License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Swarm Missiles. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Swarm Missiles even if it is normally not stocked there.

name: Swarm Clip Depot
description: The Swarm Clip Depot stages extra ammunition in your cargo bay for weapons that use Swarm Missiles. The ammunition is ready to be withdrawn for use. Storing it this way uses more cargo space than if it were packed away in sealed crates. An extra crewmember is required to maintain inventory.

name: Thermal Insulator
description: The Bunrodea learned that Korath ships are susceptible to overheating and developed this device to exacerbate that weakness on ships that tried to board them. Thermal Insulators reduce the cooling efficiency of any ship they are installed on. 	If you find this installed on your ship, get rid of it as soon as possible!

name: Lasher Rifle
description: Unlike modern Lasher Pistols, this weapon utilizes brutally savage design principles more suitable for attack than defense. It is a testament to a less civilized era in Bunrodean antiquity.

name: Heliarch Corruption
description: Evidence of corrupt activities involving a Heliarch official.

name: Camouflaged Blaster
description: Someone redesigned an old Energy Cannon to resemble a Coalition Model Cannon. The outer casing incorporates scanning interference material to help conceal its internal circuitry. These weapons are popular with both criminals and dissidents within the Coalition, allowing them to covertly arm their ships without drawing attention from the Heliarchs.

name: Camouflaged Blaster Turret
description: Three Energy Cannons disguised to resemble Coalition Model Cannons are mounted on this turret. The outer casing incorporates scanning interference material to help conceal its internal circuitry.

name: Coalition Attractor
description: Coalition Attractors played a pivotal role in the Saryd's ability to control early battles against the Quarg. Heliarch technicians would later refine this technology into a more powerful weapon.

name: Coalition Repulsor
description: Coalition Repulsors allowed Saryd escorts to keep enemy ships away from vulnerable targets. However, they lack some of the features that the Heliarch would later develop when enhancing this technology.

name: Deflector Emitter
description: The Deflector Emitter was an accidental invention that came about during the development of the Heliarch Repulsor. It supplements shield coverage over the ship, helping to protect it from asteroids or other debris. 	In addition to occupying a turret mount, each emitter installed will increase stress on the shield generators, raising consumption of resources used to replenish your shields.

name: Model Cannon
description: This Model Cannon is a non-functional representation of an actual Bombardment Cannon. Civilian ship collectors in the Coalition use these to decorate their ships for added aesthetic authenticity.

name: Model Turret
description: This Model Turret is a non-functional representation of an actual Bombardment Turret. Civilian ship collectors in the Coalition use these to decorate their ships for added aesthetic authenticity.

name: Culminator Pod
description: Culminator Torpedoes are an antique design that eventually lead to development of the modern Finishers in use by the Heliarch. Old forgotten weapons caches of these are sometimes found hidden throughout Coalition space. 	Unlike Finishers, Culminators launch hot. This shortens their range since they burn out more quickly.

name: Culminator Storage Tube
description: Culminator Storage Tubes are more compact than Finisher Storage Tubes, but lack the additional energy storage capacity of its modern counterpart.

name: Culminator Storage Depot
description: The Culminator Storage Depot stages extra ammunition in your cargo bay for weapons that use Culminator Torpedoes. The ammunition is ready to be withdrawn for use. Storing it this way uses more cargo space than if it were packed away in sealed crates. An extra crewmember is required to maintain inventory.

name: Culminator Torpedo
description: This extremely powerful missile is ammunition for the Coalition Culminator Pod. Not as maneuverable as a Finisher Torpedo and equipped with simpler tracking technology, a Culminator strike is still as destructive as that of their modern equivalents.

name: Finisher Storage Depot
description: The Finisher Storage Depot stages extra ammunition in your cargo bay for weapons that use Finisher Torpedoes. The ammunition is ready to be withdrawn for use. Storing it this way uses more cargo space than if it were packed away in sealed crates. An extra crewmember is required to maintain inventory.

name: Coalition Scanner
description: This antique scanner is far less powerful than the Scanning Modules used by the Heliarchs, but it has additional features more suitable for exploration and research.

name: Fuel Dissipator
description: The Heliarch developed this device for their boarding crews to prevent dissidents from escaping after a boarding skirmish. The Fuel Dissipator works by tapping into the fuel system of the ship it is installed on and inducing a leak. 	If you find this installed on your ship, get rid of it as soon as possible!

name: Coalition Reactor Cluster
description: Coalition Reactor Clusters are less modular than their modern Heliarch equivalents.

name: Riot Containment Barrier
description: A simple crowd control barrier made from the same durable alloys found in spaceship hulls. Easy to set up and difficult to break through, they can be surprisingly effective at blocking passage through the corridors of a ship. 	While Riot Containment Barriers are typically deployed by the Heliarchs to keep civil unrest under control, these are technically not weapons. A growing market of citizens concerned about dissidents is starting to have these installed on their ships.

name: Saryd Light Lance
description: This lance is a traditional Saryd hunting weapon that is rarely seen outside of the Coalition Games during the modern era. Private ownership of these weapons are strictly regulated and monitored by the Heliarchs. 	The tip of this spear charges and holds an energy bolt that can be used to enhance the wielder's strikes in melee or be flung at an enemy from a distance.

name: Finisher Access Temporary License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Finisher Torpedos. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Finisher Torpedos even if it is normally not stocked there. 	The knowledge for recreating Heliarch technology is not available to the general public. 	This tech can be researched instead of purchased. (Hover/Tap the attributes below for more details.) 	After this is acquired it can be found in the Licenses area in future visits to the outfitter.

name: Finisher Tech License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Finisher Torpedos. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Finisher Torpedos even if it is normally not stocked there.

description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Culminator Torpedos. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Culminator Torpedos even if it is normally not stocked there. 	The knowledge for recreating Heliarch technology is not available to the general public. 	This tech can be researched instead of purchased. (Hover/Tap the attributes below for more details.) 	After this is acquired it can be found in the Licenses area in future visits to the outfitter.

name: Culminator Tech License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Culminator Torpedos. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Culminator Torpedos even if it is normally not stocked there.

name: Graviton Channeler
description: You have no idea how this works.

name: Quantum Paradox Diffusion
description: You have no idea how this works.

name: Quantum Paradox Inversion
description: You have no idea how this works.

name: Quantum Paradox Propulsion
description: You have no idea how this works.

name: Imaginary Number Fusion Matrix
description: You have no idea how this works.

name: Omni-Directional Photonic Emitter
description: You have no idea how this works.

name: Space Differential Stabilizer
description: You have no idea how this works.

name: Zero Division Core
description: You have no idea how this works.

name: Murkspores
description: If these spores are left on your ship, Murkmold may eventually start growing there.

name: Murkmold Bay
description: This portion of your cargo bay is infested with Murkmold. Most sentient species quickly ban it once they discover its dangerous hallucinogenic effects...

name: Murkmold Bunks
description: This bunk room is infested with Murkmold, a protein rich primordial ooze that forms on Murkmold patches. While in this state, it is uninhabitable for your crew.

name: Murkmold
description: You hear a whispering voice: 	"Grow the mold..." 	"Protect the mold..." 	"Spread the mold..."

name: Rock Scavenger Meat
description: Although it looks disgusting, rock scavenger meat is considered a delicacy in the Paradise Planets. Restaurants will pay large sums of money for it.

name: Pollen?
description: This granule of exotic pollen is not only replete with nutritious proteins, but also appears to contain valuable platinum group elements bound in organic molecules. This includes a collection of complex enzymes, which appear to be capable of catalyzing many difficult reactions with ease. 	Achoo!

name: Murkspores?
description: If these spores are aboard your ship, some sort of fungus may eventually start growing there.

name: Bioroid (Crushed)
description: The bioroid's delicate casing was crushed. The scrambled biomatter leaking out leaves a goopy mess on the floor.

name: Liquid Metal Specimen
description: Specimen ID Number: HG-80 Source: Moktar Notes: Multimorphic Nanomachines. Can mimic shape, not color. Property of The Syndicate. Biohazard. Do not open. If found, return to the Syndicate offices at the Foundry spaceport in the Achernar system.

name: Gray Eye Specimen
description: The slimy goopy remains of a Gray Eye. This is a rare specimen. You can install it on your ship to keep it from getting mixed in with the regular cargo.

name: Luminazoa Specimen
description: The slimy goopy remains of a Luminazoa. It glows in the dark. This is a rare specimen. You can install it on your ship to keep it from getting mixed in with the regular cargo.

name: Leech Specimen
description: The slimy goopy remains of an Ionic Leech. You feel static electricity clinging to the surface of the container. This is a rare specimen. You can install it on your ship to keep it from getting mixed in with the regular cargo.

name: Nautilus Specimen
description: The slimy goopy remains of an Astero Nautilus. You're almost certain that one of the tentacles just twitched... This is a rare specimen. You can install it on your ship to keep it from getting mixed in with the regular cargo.

name: Plasma Specimen
description: The slimy goopy remains of a Plasma Parasite. Handle with care. This is a rare specimen. You can install it on your ship to keep it from getting mixed in with the regular cargo.

name: Firefly Specimen
description: The slimy goopy remains of a Nova Firefly. The surface of the container feels warm. This is a rare specimen. You can install it on your ship to keep it from getting mixed in with the regular cargo.

name: Gazer Specimen
description: The slimy goopy remains of a Star Gazer. The eye seems to be staring at you... This is a rare specimen. You can install it on your ship to keep it from getting mixed in with the regular cargo.

name: Nightmare Fuel License
description: You have witnessed things rational minds were not meant to see. Now, strange phantoms hover just beyond your field of vision and you hear faint echoes breaking moments of silence. It is as if the thin veneer of sanity has been torn ever so slightly, granting you awareness of another reality interposed with our own...

name: Haunted Accommodations
description: Passengers claim this room is haunted. Those assigned to it report seeing strange visions or hearing weird sounds during their voyage. Although this is supposed to be Luxury Accommodations, it no longer attracts high quality customers. Instead, this is attracting clients of a different sort... 	Ever since you had your own strange experience here you haven't set foot in it again. The Haunted Accomodations appears normal, but ship status reports indicate that it no longer occupies as much space as it used to.

name: Unknown Element
description: This doesn't match anything in your ship's database. It could be very valuable to the right person.

name: Light Scrap Plating
description: Durable hull scraps can sometimes be salvaged from the wreckage littering Gegno battlefields. These hardened remains are representative of a particularly well constructed Gegno ship. 	This must go through a smelting process with certain materials to weld it to your hull. 	Welding this onto your hull will slow your ship down considerably. While it can be layered for more protection, the added weight is also cumulative.

name: Heavy Scrap Plating
description: Durable hull scraps can sometimes be salvaged from the wreckage littering Gegno battlefields. These battle hardened remains probably came from an especially durable Vi war ship. 	This must go through a smelting process with certain materials to weld it to your hull. 	Welding this onto your hull will slow your ship down considerably. While it can be layered for more protection, the added weight is also cumulative.

name: Thermal Scrap Plating
description: Durable hull scraps can sometimes be salvaged from the wreckage littering Gegno battlefields. The remains of certain Scin ships are somewhat resistant to heat. Perhaps this is the result of experimental hull manufacturing techniques. 	This must go through a smelting process with certain materials to weld it to your hull. Welding this onto your hull will slow your ship down considerably. While it can be layered for more protection, the added weight is also cumulative.

name: Slag
description: Slag leftover from obliterated hull plating. Weapons fire from dozens of battles have rendered its base metals unrecognizable and unsalvageable.

name: Aluminum Ingot
description: Aluminum that has been processed for industrial use.

name: Copper Ingot
description: Copper that has been processed for industrial use.

name: Gold Ingot
description: Gold that has been processed for industrial use.

name: Iron Ingot
description: Iron that has been processed for industrial use.

name: Lead Ingot
description: Lead that has been processed for industrial use.

name: Neodymium Ingot
description: Neodymium that has been processed for industrial use.

name: Platinum Ingot
description: Platinum that has been processed for industrial use.

name: Pyrite Ingot
description: Pyrite that has been processed for industrial use.

name: Silicon Ingot
description: Silicon that has been processed for industrial use.

name: Silver Ingot
description: Silver that has been processed for industrial use.

name: Titanium Ingot
description: Titanium that has been processed for industrial use.

name: Tungsten Ingot
description: Tungsten that has been processed for industrial use.

name: Uranium Ingot
description: Uranium that has been processed for industrial use.

name: Genesis Flak Shell Access Temporary License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Genesis Flak Shells. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Genesis Flak Shells even if it is normally not stocked there. 	The version available for purchase is written in an alien language you don't understand... 	This tech can be researched instead of purchased. (Hover/Tap the attributes below for more details.) 	After this is acquired it can be found in the Licenses area in future visits to the outfitter.

name: Genesis Flak Shell Tech License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Genesis Flak Shells. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Genesis Flak Shells even if it is normally not stocked there.

name: High Calibur Ammo Access Temporary License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture High Calibur Ammo. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer High Calibur Ammo even if it is normally not stocked there. 	The version available for purchase is written in an alien language you don't understand... 	This tech can be researched instead of purchased. (Hover/Tap the attributes below for more details.) 	After this is acquired it can be found in the Licenses area in future visits to the outfitter.

name: High Calibur Ammo Tech License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture High Calibur Ammo. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer High Calibur Ammo even if it is normally not stocked there.

name: Genesis Mining Laser
description: This is bulky laser isn't very effective against shields. The inhabitants of Genesis have put it to use as a mining tool, allowing their ships to save ammunition for threats more dangerous than asteroids.

name: Genesis Anti-Missile
description: Genesis Anti-Missile turrets require a crew member to operate and have some other minor differences from the similarly sized Anti-Missile Turrets used by humans.

name: Genesis Flak Shell
description: Genesis Flak Shells are ammunition for the Genesis Flak Turret. Each turret holds up to 40 shells. 	Genesis ammunition, professionally manufactured by their industrial mass production factories, is a critical element to many of their weapons. Quality control measures at these facilities make them less likely to jam.

name: Genesis Flak Shell Crate
description: The Genesis Flak Shell Crate is used to store extra ammunition for Genesis Flak Turrets.

name: Genesis Flak Shell Depot
description: The Genesis Flak Shell Depot stages extra ammunition in your cargo bay for weapons that use Genesis Flak Shells. The ammunition is ready to be withdrawn for use. Storing it this way uses more cargo space than if it were packed away in sealed crates. An extra crewmember is required to maintain inventory.

name: Genesis Flak Turret
description: This is a turret mounted anti-spacecraft weapon that fires Genesis Flak Shells. The blast caused from their impact can affect friend and foe alike. 	Genesis mechanical weapons technology is far ahead of their energy weapons development. The loading systems on them are less likely to jam compared to species that put more resources on developing their energy weapons.

name: Frozen Shard Turret
description: This turret uses cryogenic technology to launch shards of frozen deuterium at its target. While they lack the durability and explosive quality of Genesis Flak Shells, it is easier to locate deuterium on a deep space excursion than it is to replenish conventional forms of ammunition. 	Genesis mechanical weapons technology is far ahead of their energy weapons development. The loading systems on them are less likely to jam compared to species that put more resources on developing their energy weapons.

name: High Calibur Ammo
description: In simple terms, "caliber" refers to the diameter of a gun's barrel. Guns are meant to be loaded with bullets that match their caliber. This ammunition is appropriately sized to be used with the High Caliber Gun. Attempting to load it with lower caliber ammunition can result in jamming or other firing mishaps. 	Genesis ammunition, professionally manufactured by their industrial mass production factories, is a critical element to many of their weapons. Quality control measures at these facilities make them less likely to jam.

name: High Calibur Boxes
description: High Caliber Ammo Boxes are used to store extra ammunition for High Caliber Guns.

name: High Calibur Depot
description: The High Caliber stages extra ammunition in your cargo bay for weapons that use High Caliber Ammo. The ammunition is ready to be withdrawn for use. Storing it this way uses more cargo space than if it were packed away in sealed crates. An extra crewmember is required to maintain inventory.

name: High Calibur Gun
description: The bullets used to load this weapon are of a higher caliber than the ones used in pirate Gatling Guns. The High Caliber Gun does greater damage while having a higher accuracy and consistency with every shot. Its rate of fire is also more steady. 	Genesis mechanical weapons technology is far ahead of their energy weapons development. The loading systems on them are less likely to jam compared to species that put more resources on developing their energy weapons.

name: Hydrogen Missile
description: While not quite as powerful as the Nuclear Missiles you are familiar with, the inhabitants of Genesis don't appear to have any aversion to the use of this technology. 	Genesis ammunition, professionally manufactured by their industrial mass production factories, is a critical element to many of their weapons. Quality control measures at these facilities make them less likely to jam. 	[Hydrogen Missiles are a one-shot weapon: each missile occupies a gun slot, and after it is fired, the slot it was in is left empty.]

name: Icicle Gun
description: This weapon utilizes cryogenic technology to convert hyperspace fuel into frozen deuterium bullets. While capable of a high fire rate, the time it takes to freeze more bullets can take twice as long as it does to expend them. At most, it can only sustain a maximum of three seconds of continuous fire. 	Genesis mechanical weapons technology is far ahead of their energy weapons development. The loading systems on them are less likely to jam compared to species that put more resources on developing their energy weapons.

name: Cryogenic Cooler
description: A Cryogenic Cooler applies cryogenic technology to efficiently maintain the internal temperature of your ship.

name: Cryogenic Hub
description: By itself, a Cryogenic Hub merely adds some cooling to your ship. Its actual purpose is to allow Cryogenic Coolers or other cryogenic technologies to be attached into its slots.

name: Cryostasis Pod
description: Most travelers will balk at the notion of riding in one of these. But there may be opportunities to transport dangerous prisoners or sensitive cargo that would otherwise be unavailable without one. 	A Cryostasis Pod continuously draws on a modest amount of power to maintain a temperature controlled environment within. If the external temperature becomes excessive, it will pull on additional power to compensate.

name: Genesis Repair Bot
description: This large robot is able to patch holes in the hull of a ship that is still in flight. When not in use, it occupies a turret mount to recharge.

name: Genesis Narrowband Scanner
description: Genesis Narrowband Scanners are incredibly efficient once locked onto a target, but have a very short range.

name: Hydrogen Collector
description: This ramscoop is a necessary component in keeping fuel hungry ships from Genesis operational.

name: Genesis Battery
description: Genesis Batteries feature a high capacity for their size but they are more vulnerable to energy draining attacks than batteries of other species.

name: Genesis Fission
description: Fission Reactors used by the inhabitants of Genesis are very efficient at generating energy, but the methods used to make this possible leave them vulnerable against ionization.

name: Genesis Radiothermal
description: Radiothermal generators used by the inhabitants of Genesis are very efficient at generating energy, but the methods used to make this possible leave them vulnerable against ionization.

name: Genesis Photovoltaic Array
description: This solar collection array is more weight efficient than the ones commonly found in human space, but is also less sophisticated.

name: Genesis Photovoltaic Panel
description: The inhabitants of Genesis have solar collection technology that is less developed than other space faring species.

name: Genesis Thermionic
description: Thermionic radioisotopic generators used by the inhabitants of Genesis are very efficient at generating energy, but the methods used to make this possible leave them vulnerable against ionization.

name: Genesis Fuel Cell
description: This fuel cells used by the inhabitants of Genesis are very efficient at generating energy, but the methods used to make this possible leave them vulnerable against ionization.

name: Genesis Afterburner
description: Genesis Afterburners use a small amount of fuel combined with a burst of energy from your ship's batteries to produce a large amount of thrust.

name: Genesis Engines
description: Genesis Engines burn a small amount of hyperspace fuel to provide turning and thrusting to their ships.

name: Anti-Missile
description: This is similar to the Anti-Missile Turret you're familiar with.

name: Laser
description: This is similar to the Beam Laser you're familiar with.

name: Gat
description: This is similar to the Gatling Gun you're familiar with.

name: Tiny Battery
description: This is a tiny battery.

name: Small Battery
description: This is a small battery.

name: Medium Battery
description: This is a medium battery.

name: Engines
description: This is a compact steering and thrusting engine.

name: Battery
description: This is a battery.

name: Fusion
description: This is a fusion reactor.

name: Radiothermal
description: Radiothermal generators harvest heat from radioactive isotopes and convert it into electricity.

name: Scanner
description: This scanner allows you to determine what outfits are installed in the ship you are currently targeting, as well as scan the cargo holds. Installing more than one increases the scan range and speed.

name: Small Photovoltaic
description: This generates power when near a star.

name: Thermionic
description: Thermionic radioisotopic generators are a cooler-running alternative to other generators.

name: Tiny Fuel Cell
description: This tiny fuel cell generates power when installed on a ship.

name: Heavy Pulse Cannon
description: An antique rarely seen on modern Hai ships, many consider Heavy Pulse Cannons obsolete. However this weapon would be a valid alternative as a substitute for an Ion Cannon. It lacks the ability to disrupt an enemy ship's energy systems, but the power of its shots should not be underestimated.

name: Ion Pulse Cannon
description: Deployed at the start of the Unfettered invasion of Wanderer space, Ion Pulse Cannons disrupt the electrical systems on any ship they hit. Individually, they aren't as effective as Ion Cannons, but these weapons are meant to be used in multiples. As a group they synchronize their rate of fire, creating waves of ionizing projectiles.

name: Ion Pulse Turret
description: Featuring a single Ion Pulse Cannon mounted onto a rotating turret base, this weapon does less damage than the similarly sized Pulse Turret. Despite this, some Unfettered captains consider the option to deliver additional ion damage from a turret mount well worth the trade-off. 	These turrets are designed to synchronize their rate of fire with each other as well as non-turreted Ion Pulse Cannons.

name: Komodo Anti-Missile
description: Komodo Anti-Missiles are more powerful than other Hai anti-missile systems, but their large space requirements compromises the offensive capabilities of the Unfettered ships they are installed on. 	Long dormant projects to produce and distribute stronger anti-missile systems were reactivated after the Unfettered encountered Wanderer Thunderheads.

name: Pulse Repeater
description: Favored by Unfettered captains who want to maximize damage from hit and run strikes, Pulse Repeaters can unleash a rapid burst of projectiles followed by a lengthy cool down period. This gives the pilot time to reposition before firing the next volley. 	Inspired by alien weapons installed on the ships of a hostile species the Hai fought long ago, Pulse Repeaters aren't for sale at Unfettered outfitters. However, any Unfettered engineer worth their acorns should be able to convert a regular Pulse Cannon into one. Whether or not they would be willing to do so is a separate issue.

name: Pulse Repeater Turret
description: A pair of Pulse Repeaters mounted onto a turret allow for powerful hit and run attacks with a rapid burst of projectiles followed by a lengthy cool down period. Focusing fire with all of your turrets is essential to taking full advantage of this feature. 	Unfettered outfitters are unwilling to stock this weapon due to the potential of an alien inspired modification being perceived as superior to the original Hai version. Despite this, more than a few Unfettered starship captains have commissioned these conversions to gain an edge on the battlefield.

name: Hai Displacer
description: This is ammunition for a Displacer Pod. 	The Displacer only generates holographic decoys after it launches. Managing ammunition inventory would be unnecessarily difficult otherwise.

name: Displacer Storage Pod
description: The Displacer Storage Pod is used to store extra ammunition for Displacer Pods. 	The Unfettered now have a new hazing ritual to torture fresh recruits: They are instructed to double check the inventory and confirm that none of the stored Displacers are holographic.

name: Displacer Storage Depot
description: The Displacer Storage Depot stages extra ammunition in your cargo bay for weapons that use Hai Displacers. The ammunition is ready to be withdrawn for use. Storing it this way uses more cargo space than if it were packed away in sealed crates. An extra crewmember is required to maintain inventory.

name: Hai Displacer Pod
description: Displacers are Trackers that have had their optical tracking hardware replaced with holographic projectors. These create phantom missiles that escort the Displacer towards its target, helping it to slip through the enemy's anti-missile defenses.

name: Hai Nutcracker
description: The Hai once deployed Nutcracker missiles long ago against an enemy occupying a galactic region far from their space. The campaign didn't end well. After it was over, this weapon was abandoned over concerns about its collateral damage and potential lingering effects resulting from prolonged use. 	This weapon is no longer in production. It is a relic from an age of Hai domination and galactic conquest. 	[Nutcracker missiles are a one-shot weapon: each missile occupies a gun slot, and after it is fired, the slot it was in is left empty.]

name: Phantom Tracker (Gun)
description: The Phantom Tracker generates a realistic hologram of a Hai Tracker missile. At minimum, the enemy anti-missile defense wastes resources firing at it. But this can also serve as a decoy to allow other, real, missiles through to hit their target. 	Because the missile isn't real, guidance is accomplished entirely through visual positioning data fed into the Phantom Tracker.

name: Phantom Tracker (Turret)
description: Hai tacticians were taught to look for the tell-tale signs of Phantom Trackers. They have a shorter range than real Trackers due to limitations of the holographic technology. They move slightly faster. And undisciplined gunners will fire them more often than real tracker pods can. 	Fortunately, most Hai tacticians are either retired or among the Unfettered.

name: Tracker Storage Depot
description: The Tracker Storage Depot stages extra ammunition in your cargo bay for weapons that use Hai Trackers. The ammunition is ready to be withdrawn for use. Storing it this way uses more cargo space than if it were packed away in sealed crates. An extra crewmember is required to oversee maintenance of the ammunition.

name: Railgun Slug Depot
description: The Railgun Slug Depot stages extra ammunition in your cargo bay for weapons that use Railgun Slugs. The ammunition is ready to be withdrawn for use. Storing it this way uses more cargo space than if it were packed away in sealed crates. An extra crewmember is required to maintain inventory.

name: Hai Heliotrope Regenerator
description: Heliotrope Regenerators have carried legendary warriors though the bloodiest of conflicts. However, the extreme heat it generates proved disastrous when the Hai faced an enemy prepared to abuse that weakness. Now, only the most courageous of the True Hai dare to install this on their ships.

name: Hai Mistral Cooling
description: The Unfettered once fought enemies whose weapons pushed their ships well past safe heat levels. Mistral Cooling systems were developed to defend against such attacks.

name: Ionic Snare
description: Any ship an Ionic Snare is installed on will have its power systems disrupted. The Hai developed this device during the Korath invasion to give their crews a way to sabotage enemy ships that got close enough to board. 	If you find this installed on your ship, get rid of it as soon as possible!

name: Modified Hyperdrive (Hai)
description: At its height, the Hai empire stretched across an expanse almost double the size of human space. Fluctuator Drives are a relic of this bygone age. They are the result of research into making a fuel efficient Hyperdrive for facilitating travel from one end of the empire to the other.

name: Modified Nugget Finder
description: As its name suggests, the Nugget Finder was originally used by the ancient Hai to mine asteroids and harvest gas giants. However, the Unfettered discovered that a few subtle adjustments allow it to target a ship and identify the outfits it has installed.

name: Quantum Bloodstone
description: A rare variant of the Quantum Keystone. Hai who prefer these treat them with an awe and reverence that almost seems fanatical. 	Quantum Bloodstones aren't for sale at regular outfitters. The few Hai who have them keep their source a closely guarded secret.

name: Dual Pulse Pistols
description: A pair of modified heavy pulse pistols favored by some Unfettered and the occasional pirate captain. Dual wielding them adds another gun during short raids against a ship's defenders. Individually, they lose their energy charge more quickly than a pulse rifle, making them a poor choice for holding a defensive position during a long siege.

name: Ion Flash Bang
description: Ion Flash Bangs are defensive weapons used by the Hai to create a disruptive ion burst that drains energy weapons of their charge while causing mechanical weapons to jam.

name: Ion Pulse Shotgun
description: A weapon stolen from Farpoint's evidence vault, this appears to be a heavily modified Hai Pulse Rifle. Twin barrels fire a pair of ion pulse blasts that collide as they rush towards the target, bursting into a spread that affects a wide area. Mechanical weapons caught in the blast temporarily become inoperable. Ironically, due to the intensity of the recoil, smaller species such as the Hai may find this weapon difficult to wield.

name: Quantum Dragon Blade
description: This Quantum Key Blade is an ancient Hai artifact from the era when their people still waged war on other alien races across the galaxy. The blade is forged from a single Quantum Key Stone of the highest quality. A design of the micro circuitry in the hand grip, the technological secrets of which have been lost to antiquity, sends a charge through the blade that alters the wielder's quantum alignment, granting the ability to walk through walls or other solid matter. The hand guard has an intricate carving of a dragon on it. Holding it fills you with a sense of determination.

name: Quantum Key Blade
description: This Quantum Key Blade is an ancient Hai artifact from the era when their people still waged war on other alien races across the galaxy. The blade is forged from a single Quantum Key Stone of the highest quality. A design of the micro circuitry in the hand grip, the technological secrets of which have been lost to antiquity, sends a charge through the blade that alters the wielder's quantum alignment, granting the ability to walk through walls or other solid matter.

name: Quantum Phoenix Blade
description: This Quantum Key Blade is an ancient Hai artifact from the era when their people still waged war on other alien races across the galaxy. A design of the micro circuitry in the hand grip sends a charge through the blade that alters the wielder's quantum alignment, granting the ability to walk through walls or other solid matter. The hand guard of this Quantum Key Blade has an intricate carving of a phoenix on it. You feel warm and refreshed while holding it.

name: Quantum Snake Blade
description: This Quantum Key Blade is an ancient Hai artifact from the era when their people still waged war on other alien races across the galaxy. A design of the micro circuitry in the hand grip sends a charge through the blade that alters the wielder's quantum alignment, granting the ability to walk through walls or other solid matter. The hand guard of this Quantum Key Blade has an intricate carving of a snake on it. Holding it fills you with a sense of mischief.

name: Quantum Tiger Blade
description: This Quantum Key Blade is an ancient Hai artifact from the era when their people still waged war on other alien races across the galaxy. A design of the micro circuitry in the hand grip sends a charge through the blade that alters the wielder's quantum alignment, granting the ability to walk through walls or other solid matter. The hand guard of this Quantum Key Blade has an intricate carving of a tiger on it. It consumes a fair bit of energy while charging. You feel invigorated just from holding it in your hands.

name: Quantum Turtle Blade
description: This Quantum Key Blade is an ancient Hai artifact from the era when their people still waged war on other alien races across the galaxy. A design of the micro circuitry in the hand grip sends a charge through the blade that alters the wielder's quantum alignment, granting the ability to walk through walls or other solid matter. The hand guard of this Quantum Key Blade has an intricate carving of a turtle on it. You feel contemplative and aloof while in possession of it.

name: Unfettered Militia License
description: The Unfettered Militia license exists in both verbal and physical form: Simply claim that you have one. If anyone objects, physically convince them of their error in judgement. It's the Unfettered way.

name: Tracker Access Temporary License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Hai Trackers. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Hai Trackers even if it is normally not stocked there. 	This tech can be researched instead of purchased. (Hover/Tap the attributes below for more details.) 	After this is acquired it can be found in the Licenses area in future visits to the outfitter.

name: Tracker Tech License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Hai Trackers. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Hai Trackers even if it is normally not stocked there.

name: Railgun Access Temporary License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Railgun Slugs. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Railgun Slugs even if it is normally not stocked there. 	This tech can be researched instead of purchased. (Hover/Tap the attributes below for more details.) 	After this is acquired it can be found in the Licenses area in future visits to the outfitter.

name: Railgun Tech License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Railgun Slugs. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Railgun Slugs even if it is normally not stocked there.

name: Displacer Access Temporary License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Hai Displacers. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Hai Displacers even if it is normally not stocked there. 	Only the True Hai may access the secret technology for making Unfettered weapons. 	This tech can be researched instead of purchased. (Hover/Tap the attributes below for more details.) 	After this is acquired it can be found in the Licenses area in future visits to the outfitter.

name: Displacer Tech License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Hai Displacers. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Hai Displacers even if it is normally not stocked there.

name: Prototype Ramscoop FCX
description: This prototype isn't working as intended...

name: Prototype Lodestone Engine MDX
description: This prototype isn't working as intended...

name: Prototype Shield Modulator SD-DSD
description: This prototype isn't working as intended...

name: Prototype Cooling HGX
description: This prototype isn't working as intended...

name: Prototype Power Converter ECX
description: This prototype isn't working as intended...

name: Secret Prototype
description: A secret prototype stolen from a merchant vessel. You have no idea how it works.

name: Smuggled Cargo
description: Cargo stolen from a smuggler which has caught the interest of a pirate warlord.

name: Secret Data
description: Secret data on an encrypted chip. You have no clue what the contents are.

name: Barracks
description: This converts part of your cargo bay into barracks for use by combat grunts. Typically, the living conditions in these cramped quarters are unsuitable for paying passengers.

name: Barracks (Burned)
description: This barracks was looted and burned during a previous boarding battle by the enemy crew. Fortunately, no one was inside at the time it was destroyed. But the charred bunks are unusable and the sight of the soot stained walls burdens your crew with the weight of their loss. 	This is an eyesore and a waste of space. Perhaps you should have this mess cleaned out while you're at the outfitter.

name: Broadband Amplifier
description: An artifact from the early era of space exploration, a Broadband Amplifier improves the range of your existing cargo and outfit scanners. However, this also increases the amount of time required to complete those scans. It is primarily found on science vessels for which maintaining a safe distance from dangerous intersellar phenomena is more relevant than quickly scanning ships for contraband or tactical information. 	This device cannot be installed on a ship that doesn't already have equipment for scanning both cargo and outfits.

name: Bunk Room (Burned)
description: This bunk room was looted and burned during a previous boarding battle by the enemy crew. Fortunately, no one was inside at the time it was destroyed. But the charred bunks are unusable and the sight of the soot stained walls burdens your crew with the weight of their loss. 	This is an eyesore and a waste of space. Perhaps you should have this mess cleaned out while you're at the outfitter.

name: D41-HY Shielding (Damaged)
description: The D41-HY Shield Generator is a more powerful shield generator designed for ships that are likely to see frequent combat, or that have such a large shield capacity that recharging them would take a long time with a smaller generator. A malfunction in this generator is causing reduced performance, excessive energy consumption, and waste heat. It also seems to be causing a slight delay before the shield regeneration process actually begins.

name: Detachable Heat Sink
description: A Detachable Heat Sink safely captures and stores excess heat as it accumulates on your ship. But it doesn't provide any actual cooling. 	Most pilots have little use for this antiquated form of heat management technology. But some outfitters still keep them in stock to satisfy a niche market of high performance pilots in search of alternative methods to manage the heat on their ships.

name: Engineering Room
description: An Engineering Room acts as a centralized control center for managing repairs and regulating the flow of energy on your ship. This can make energy usage by certain outfits more efficient while also alleviating effects that negatively impact your ship. A skilled engineering crew who understands how these systems work and interact with each other is essential to Engineering Room operations. 	Engineering Rooms are also often the location where a ship's self-destruct sequence is activated. Typically it involves deliberately causing a reactor meltdown in the ship's power systems or some similar catastrophic failure. At a minimum, this usually requires the cooperation of both the captain and the engineering crew.

name: Fuel Canister
description: A Fuel Canister increases your fuel capacity slightly. It's not enough to make a hyperspace jump, but can provide extra reserves for an afterburner.

name: Fuel Canister (Reinforced)
description: Due to variances in atmospheric pressure, reinforced Fuel Canisters were developed for harvesting gases from gas giants. Once brought to a controlled environment, the harvested gas could be refined and transferred to regular Fuel Pods for transport. 	Although this carries less fuel than a regular Fuel Canister, it has a thicker armored casing that protects against leaks.

name: Fuel Pod (Reinforced)
description: Due to variances in atmospheric pressure, reinforced Fuel Pods were developed for harvesting gases from gas giants. Once brought to a controlled environment, the harvested gas could be refined and transferred to regular Fuel Pods for transport. 	Although this carries less fuel than a regular Fuel Pod, it has a thicker armored casing that protects against leaks.

name: Fuel Tank
description: A Fuel Tank increases your fuel capacity greatly, enough to power a Scramdrive for one additional hyperspace jump.

name: Fuel Tank (Reinforced)
description: Due to variances in atmospheric pressure, reinforced Fuel Tanks were developed for harvesting gases from gas giants. Once brought to a controlled environment, the harvested gas could be refined and transferred to regular Fuel Tanks for transport. 	Although this carries less fuel than a regular Fuel Tank, it has a thicker armored casing that protects against leaks.

name: Hull Repair Equipment
description: Equipment designed to fix the hull of a ship while it is still in operation. This includes the actual repair tools as well as diagnostic equipment and environmental suits for accessing external areas of the ship. 	Before hull repairs can begin there is a delay while the crew analyzes the damage to determine how to fix it.

name: Industrial Ramscoop
description: An Industrial Ramscoop is often used to supplement deuterium harvesting operations on space stations. It's bulkier than a regular ramscoop but is able to process hyperspace fuel more efficiently.

name: Infiltrator Tech
description: The Infiltrator has this specialized scan interference and radar jamming technology integrated into the hull. It also features an optical jamming feature that causes the shields to shimmer in a way that helps the ship blend in with starry backgrounds. Data on its inner workings is classified information not available to the general public.

name: Limit Breaker
description: This outfit is sometimes referred to as the "Berserker Circuit" after the first ship it was used in. Many consider the development of this device a reckless attempt to push a ship's combat abilities to its maximum limits. But installing a Limit Breaker on your ship allows it to keep functioning well past the point that it would be disabled due to internal safety mechanisms shutting your systems down. 	Installing more than one of these outfits reduces their effectiveness as they interfere with each other as well as your ship's internal safety shutdown systems.

name: Liquid Metal Hull
description: Made with Korath nanomachine technology. Its ability to regenerate itself is unparalleled. 	This hull can reshape itself, making it compatible with a variety of hull technologies.

name: Modified D14-RN Shielding
description: The D14-RN Shield Generator is the standard shield generator for fighters and interceptors, as well as for many non-combat starships. Although it is possible for a ship to have no shield generator at all, recharging its shield matrix only when landed in a hospitable spaceport, life in deep space is unpredictable enough that most pilots find shield generators to be well worth the space they take up. 	Modifications to this outfit have increased its rate of shield generation. However it consumes considerably more energy while also generating heat as a result of being pushed to perform beyond the intended specifications it was designed for. Note that these after market alterations voids the manufacturer's warranty.

name: Modified D23-QP Shielding
description: The D23-QP Shield Generator is a slightly more powerful shield generator than the standard model installed in most small ships. If combat lasts long enough, the increased recharge rate is enough to give you an edge, but recharging your shields completely will still take a long time. 	Modifications to this outfit have increased its rate of shield generation. However it consumes considerably more energy while also generating heat as a result of being pushed to perform beyond the intended specifications it was designed for. Note that these after market alterations voids the manufacturer's warranty.

name: Modified D41-HY Shielding
description: The D41-HY Shield Generator is a more powerful shield generator designed for ships that are likely to see frequent combat, or that have such a large shield capacity that recharging them would take a long time with a smaller generator. 	Modifications to this outfit have increased its rate of shield generation. However it consumes considerably more energy while also generating heat as a result of being pushed to perform beyond the intended specifications it was designed for. Note that these after market alterations voids the manufacturer's warranty.

name: Modified D67-TM Shielding
description: The D67-TM Shield Generator is powerful enough that in combat against some particularly weak ships, they may not even be capable of depleting your shields as fast as they recharge. 	Modifications to this outfit have increased its rate of shield generation. However it consumes considerably more energy while also generating heat as a result of being pushed to perform beyond the intended specifications it was designed for. Note that these after market alterations voids the manufacturer's warranty.

name: Modified D94-YV Shielding
description: The D94-YV Shield Generator is the most powerful shield generator available in human space. Because of their large size, D94-YV shield generators are mostly used in large warships, but you can fit one in a smaller ship if you are willing to sacrifice engine power or weaponry to make space for it. 	Modifications to this outfit have increased its rate of shield generation. However it consumes considerably more energy while also generating heat as a result of being pushed to perform beyond the intended specifications it was designed for. Note that these after market alterations voids the manufacturer's warranty.

name: Modified Hyperdrive
description: This hyperdrive has been modified to be more fuel efficient, allowing a ship to conserve fuel for long journeys. 	Rumors speculate that these Modified Hyperdrives are artifacts discovered in alien ruins on a planet in the Northern Frontier. There's no evidence to support such claims, but the list of humans who understand the inner workings of the hyperdrive is short and none of them have stepped forward to take credit for creating this.

name: Modified Jammer
description: This device has been altered to interfere with scanners instead of radar. A professional smuggler's tool, most security inspectors lack the technical expertise to distinguish between this and a normal radar jammer.

name: North Wind Cooling
description: An advanced air duct cooling system developed by North Wind. While bulkier than the industry standard cooling ducts, this new system offers additional emergency cooling if the ship starts to overheat.

name: Prototype D122-ZX Shielding
description: The Prototype D122-ZX Shielding from Deep Sky is a next generation shield generator under development in human space. Larger than the the D94-YV Shield Generator, it boasts a shield generation rate beyond anything Deep Sky has ever produced. 	This experimental generator draws immense energy while producing a massive amount of waste heat, reminiscent of the modified generators sometimes used by pirates.

name: Prototype T88-AO Shielding
description: Inspired by observations of Quarg technology, the Prototype T88-AO Shielding from Tarazed is a test model generator used for experiments in human space. Larger than anything sold at regular outfitters, it pushes the limits of shield generation technology. 	This experimental generator draws immense energy while producing a massive amount of waste heat. It also temporarily overloads once the ship's shields have been depleted.

name: Shield Suppressor
description: Saboteurs use these devices to disrupt the shield generators on the ship it is installed on. 	If you find this installed on your ship, get rid of it as soon as possible!

name: Small Bunk Room (Burned)
description: This bunk room was looted and burned during a previous boarding battle by the enemy crew. Fortunately, no one was inside at the time it was destroyed. But the charred bunks are unusable and the sight of the soot stained walls burdens your crew with the weight of their loss. 	This is an eyesore and a waste of space. Perhaps you should have this mess cleaned out while you're at the outfitter.

name: Smuggler's Hideaway
description: This hidden compartment, lined with a material similar to Interference Plating, helps conceal part of your cargo bay from scans and searches.

name: Spycraft Adapter
description: This is Navy technology, designed to plug into an expansion port hidden underneath a standard Navy Surveillance Pod. This boosts the power of the pod while incurring only a minor reduction in efficiency.

name: Gnome Core
description: A collaboration between Deep Sky and Turner Inc. The Gnome Core is a more powerful Dwarf Core, offering an amazing amount of power in a compact generator.

name: Fission S2 Reactor
description: A collaboration between Syndicated Systems and Turner Inc. The Fission S2 offers more efficiency than the Fission Reactor with only a modest increase in size.

name: Heavy Fusion Core
description: A collaboration between Lovelace Labs and Turner Inc. The Heavy Fusion Core is a new entry in the energy generator market, using innovations in reactor design to deliver a superior fusion reactor.

name: H6 Refrigeration Module
description: As a cooling device, this prototype refrigeration module is a complete failure at preventing spoilage of food and other perishables that require cold storage. But there is another potential use for it. The energy feedback generated when it activates can be utilized for powering other systems on a ship. Despite the steam rising off of its surface, you're certain using it this way won't cause it to blow up. Probably.

name: LCT-2 Photovoltaic Rod
description: Light Conductor Technologies most successful product was also their first one: a rod extending out from the hull which cut down on the internal space requirements for installing photovoltaic panels. This lead the company to produce increasingly larger versions of the same product rather than research alternative technologies. 	This array has two photovoltaic panels mounted on it. Some of the energy collected is lost as it is transferred into the ship.

name: LCT-4 Photovoltaic Wand
description: The cost to benefit ratio of their weight and power output was something Light Conductor Technologies strived to improve in their later designs. Yet it was not enough to keep up with the technical advancements of their competitors. 	This array has four photovoltaic panels mounted on it. Some of the energy collected is lost as it is transferred into the ship.

name: LCT-6 Photovoltaic Staff
description: This was the last photovoltaic array developed by Light Conductor Technologies before the company went bankrupt. Unofficial duplicates of their products are still manufactured in some remote areas of the galaxy even though their business no longer exists. 	This array has six photovoltaic panels mounted on it. Some of the energy collected is lost as it is transferred into the ship.

name: Modified nGVF-AA Fuel Cell
description: Fuel cells have been the cheapest and most common starship power sources since the dawn of the space era. This model produces only enough power for very small or slow ships. 	This fuel cell has been modified to store some of the energy it generates. However, it is not as efficient as a standard fuel cell of the same size.

name: Modified nGVF-BB Fuel Cell
description: This is a step up from the smallest fuel cells, providing enough energy to power a few small guns in addition to your engines. 	This fuel cell has been modified to store some of the energy it generates. However, it is not as efficient as a standard fuel cell of the same size.

name: Modified nGVF-CC Fuel Cell
description: This is a medium-sized fuel cell, designed to be sufficient for larger civilian ships and small warships while still being more affordable than the more sophisticated generator options. 	This fuel cell has been modified to store some of the energy it generates. However, it is not as efficient as a standard fuel cell of the same size.

name: Modified nGVF-DD Fuel Cell
description: This is a relatively large fuel cell. Other generators are available that produce more energy and fit into a smaller space, but they are much more expensive. As a result, large civilian ships that will not be frequently in combat often come equipped with these fuel cells. 	This fuel cell has been modified to store some of the energy it generates. However, it is not as efficient as a standard fuel cell of the same size.

name: Modified nGVF-EE Fuel Cell
description: This is the largest fuel cell available, larger than some nuclear reactors but much, much more affordable. Many captains on a tight budget are willing to put up with one of these until they can raise the money for something more efficient. 	This fuel cell has been modified to store some of the energy it generates. However, it is not as efficient as a standard fuel cell of the same size.

name: Modified RT-I Radiothermal
description: This radiothermal generator has been modified to greatly increase its energy output. But these alterations have resulted in it producing an incredibly high amount of heat. Using this can be dangerous: if allowed to overheat it can create power surges that ignite electrical fires, causing internal damage to the ship it is installed on. 	Some claim that the technique used to make these modified radiothermals originated from stolen research data regarding one of Tarazed's failed experiments. Whenever asked about this topic, the company always denies the validity of such rumors.

name: QT-800 Nucleovoltaic
description: Nucleovoltaic generators are a relatively recent generator technology that harvests energy from the decay of a radioisotope source and converts it directly into electricity. They are the most powerful generator that relies on nuclear decay instead of an active nuclear chain reaction. 	Tarazed's research into Quarg technology has had some unexpected findings. This prototype generator, for example, is able to achieve a significantly higher power output than the Nucleovoltaics produced by Deep Sky. Yet it is unable to do so consistently. Testing results reveal a pattern of energy spikes accompanying incidents when the test ship was overheating. However the reason for this has yet to be solved, baffling even Tarazed's most knowledgeable scientists.

name: TP036q Battery Pack
description: A ship can run without batteries if its generator's instantaneous power output is higher than the total energy consumption of its systems, but batteries make it possible to store up energy when it is not needed and thus to use a much smaller and cheaper generator. 	Research on Quarg technology has enabled Tarazed to develop this higher capacity battery. Unfortunately, it becomes unstable when exposed to high temperatures, losing its ability to retain the energy stored within. Insufficient generators can result in a cascade failure that can drain other batteries.

name: TP072q Battery Pack
description: This battery pack has more than twice the energy capacity of the most basic model, allowing your ship to engage in combat for longer periods of time before running out of energy. Some pilots have even been known to install these in lieu of any generator at all, trusting that they can reach their destination planet and recharge before running out of battery power, but that is a risky proposition. 	Research on Quarg technology has enabled Tarazed to develop this higher capacity battery. Unfortunately, it becomes unstable when exposed to high temperatures, losing its ability to retain the energy stored within. Insufficient generators can result in a cascade failure that can drain other batteries.

name: TP144q Battery Pack
description: This medium-sized battery pack is intended for ships that need to fire the occasional salvo of high-powered weaponry without running out of energy. As with all battery packs, relying on batteries is risky if combat lasts long enough for them to become depleted. 	Research on Quarg technology has enabled Tarazed to develop this higher capacity battery. Unfortunately, it becomes unstable when exposed to high temperatures, losing its ability to retain the energy stored within. Insufficient generators can result in a cascade failure that can drain other batteries.

name: TP288q Battery Pack
description: This is a large battery pack designed for ships that may occasionally have high power needs but do not want the expense or the heat associated with a more powerful ship's generator. 	Research on Quarg technology has enabled Tarazed to develop this higher capacity battery. Unfortunately, it becomes unstable when exposed to high temperatures, losing its ability to retain the energy stored within. Insufficient generators can result in a cascade failure that can drain other batteries.

name: TP576q Battery Pack
description: For most ships that require this much power, a larger generator makes more sense than a battery this size. However, battery packs have the advantage that they generate no heat, so some captains use them instead of powerful generators if they do not expect to be in combat frequently or for extended periods of time. 	Research on Quarg technology has enabled Tarazed to develop this higher capacity battery. Unfortunately, it becomes unstable when exposed to high temperatures, losing its ability to retain the energy stored within. Insufficient generators can result in a cascade failure that can drain other batteries.

name: Hybrid Afterburner
description: A modified afterburner that also taps into your ships batteries for additional power, providing an increased burst of speed.

name: Archaic Afterburner
description: The original manufacturer of this Archaic Afterburner has been long forgotten. However, it has been preserved in remarkably good condition for its age. 	An afterburner works by dumping hyperspace fuel into your engines and igniting it, producing a large amount of thrust. This can be very useful for dodging missiles or briefly escaping from faster opponents, but you must be careful to avoid using up so much fuel that you do not have enough left for hyperspace travel.

name: Sunracer Afterburner
description: Designed for use in racing, this afterburner draws power from your ships batteries as well as hyperspace fuel, providing an increased burst of speed.

name: Chimera Junk Thruster
description: This motley collection of spare parts has been assembled into a Junk propulsion system. This tiny thruster is suitable for very light fighters and interceptors. 	Junk engines are usually a bit more powerful than ion engines of the same size, but they are less efficient than plasma engines.

name: Griffin Junk Thruster
description: Many frontier tinkerers with no formal education began their careers by cobbling together a Junk propulsion system. This thruster is intended for small ships and freighters. 	Junk engines are usually a bit more powerful than ion engines of the same size, but they are less efficient than plasma engines.

name: Hippogriff Junk Thruster
description: Considering how they're manufactured, it's a technical marvel that the various parts used to construct a Junk propulsion system are functional. This thruster is suitable for smaller capital ships. 	Junk engines are usually a bit more powerful than ion engines of the same size, but they are less efficient than plasma engines.

name: Manticore Junk Thruster
description: Finding quality propulsion systems can be difficult on some distant frontier worlds. This large thruster is a necessity on ships too heavy for smaller engines to handle. 	Junk engines are usually a bit more powerful than ion engines of the same size, but they are less efficient than plasma engines.

name: Tarasque Junk Thruster
description: Frontier captains will resort to using Junk propulsion systems when alternative options are unavailable. This set of huge thrusters can only be installed on ships large enough to handle them. 	Junk engines are usually a bit more powerful than ion engines of the same size, but they are less efficient than plasma engines.

name: Chimera Junk Steering
description: Junk steering systems are patchwork constructs made from the salvaged parts of other engines. This tiny engine is named after a mythical creature that had a lion's head, a goat's body, and a serpent's tail. 	Junk engines are usually a bit more powerful than ion engines of the same size, but they are less efficient than plasma engines.

name: Griffin Junk Steering
description: Junk steering systems are patchwork constructs made from the salvaged parts of other engines. This small engine is named after a mythical creature that had the head, forepart, and wings of an eagle and the body, hind legs, and tail of a lion. 	Junk engines are usually a bit more powerful than ion engines of the same size, but they are less efficient than plasma engines.

name: Hippogriff Junk Steering
description: Junk steering systems are patchwork constructs made from the salvaged parts of other engines. This medium sized engine is named after a mythical creature that had the foreparts of a griffin and the body of a horse. 	Junk engines are usually a bit more powerful than ion engines of the same size, but they are less efficient than plasma engines.

name: Manticore Junk Steering
description: Junk steering systems are patchwork constructs made from the salvaged parts of other engines. This large engine is named after a mythical creature that had the head of a man, the body of a lion, and the tail of a scorpion. 	Junk engines are usually a bit more powerful than ion engines of the same size, but they are less efficient than plasma engines.

name: Tarasque Junk Steering
description: Junk steering systems are patchwork constructs made from the salvaged parts of other engines. This huge engine is named after a mythical creature that had the head of a lion, the body of a turtle, the feet of a bear, and a serpent's tail. 	Junk engines are usually a bit more powerful than ion engines of the same size, but they are less efficient than plasma engines.

name: Antique Rifle
description: This rifle was in use prior to the Alpha War. While not significantly better or worse than modern rifles, collectors will pay a premium for it.

name: Blaster Pistol
description: Blaster Pistols rose to prominence as side-arms during the Alpha wars, but use charger packs instead of bullet magazines. Most manufacturers stopped producing them after the war due to increased production costs for the charger packs.

name: DFN-53 Android
description: While these were once considered cutting-edge outfits, their lack of autonomous capabilities and economic benefit ensured they were never licensed by a manufacturer. 	Despite this, some captains commissioned these directly from their inventor. This defense android does little to assist with shipboard operations. Instead, it was programmed to protect the ship from hostile boarders.
